input.weak_title: Asus M1502-BQ580 24 GB 512 GB buen precio
input.weak_description: Producto en venta. Consultar disponibilidad y características por mensaje.

title_issues: 'buen precio' is a promotional filler phrase that MELI penalizes and top-ranked listings never use — it occupies valuable title space without adding searchable information
The processor model (Ryzen 5 7530U) and brand (AMD) are completely absent, which is the primary search filter buyers use
The product line 'VivoBook 15' is missing — trending data shows 'marca asus vivobook 15.6 pulgadas' is actively searched
RAM and storage figures ('24 GB 512 GB') appear without labels or type context — buyers cannot tell if storage is SSD or HDD
Screen size (15.6") is absent, a critical spec buyers filter by in the notebooks category
The word 'notebook' or 'laptop' does not appear explicitly in the title, reducing keyword match for broad searches like 'computadora portatil'
description_issues: Description contains zero technical specifications — processor, RAM, storage type, screen resolution, OS, battery, and connectivity are all absent
The phrase 'Consultar disponibilidad y características por mensaje' signals to buyers and MELI's algorithm that the listing is incomplete, reducing conversion and ranking
No use-case context is provided (e.g., suitable for university, home office, content creation) to help buyers self-qualify
No warranty, after-sale, or return policy information is included, which top catalog listings always specify to build buyer trust
Description does not mention key differentiators of this specific SKU such as the 24 GB RAM configuration or AMD Radeon integrated graphics
priority_fixes: Rewrite the title to: 'Notebook Asus VivoBook 15 M1502 AMD Ryzen 5 24GB RAM 512GB SSD 15.6" Win11' — removing 'buen precio' and adding processor, product line, screen size, and storage type
Fill in PROCESSOR_MODEL (Ryzen 5 7530U), PROCESSOR_BRAND (AMD), OPERATING_SYSTEM (Windows 11 Home), SCREEN_SIZE (15.6"), and SCREEN_RESOLUTION (1920x1080 FHD) in the attributes panel immediately
Replace the description with a structured spec sheet covering: processor, RAM amount and type, storage capacity and type, screen size/resolution, OS, ports, weight, and battery life
Add RAM_MEMORY_TYPE (DDR4), SSD_DATA_STORAGE_CAPACITY (512 GB), and WEIGHT to attributes to match the completeness level of top-ranked VivoBook listings
Incorporate 'computadora portatil' and 'VivoBook 15.6 pulgadas' naturally into the description body to capture those trending search queries

input.weak_title: CDTek FUNDA CON BOLSILLO buen precio
input.weak_description: Producto en venta. Consultar disponibilidad y características por mensaje.

title_issues: The phrase 'buen precio' is a promotional filler that wastes title space and is penalized by MELI's ranking algorithm — it communicates no product attribute
The title omits the material of the case (e.g., neoprene, polyester, Oxford fabric), which is a primary purchase decision factor for buyers
No color is specified, forcing buyers to click through just to find basic product information
The screen size '15.6"' appears only in attributes and not in the title, missing a high-value search keyword
The product type is ambiguous — 'funda' could mean sleeve, pouch, or cover; the specific format (sleeve, maletín, sobre) is not stated
description_issues: The description contains zero product information — it does not mention material, dimensions, compatible laptop models, or any feature beyond what the title already states
The phrase 'Consultar disponibilidad y características por mensaje' violates MELI's content policies and signals to buyers that the listing is incomplete, reducing conversion
No compatibility information is provided (e.g., which laptop brands/models fit: Dell Inspiron 15, ASUS VivoBook 15.6, Samsung, HP), which is critical for accessory listings
No internal or external dimensions are listed, so buyers cannot verify their laptop will fit
No use-case or differentiating value is communicated (e.g., water resistance, padding thickness, organizational pockets for accessories)
priority_fixes: Rewrite the description with at minimum: material, internal dimensions, compatible laptop brands/models (Dell Inspiron 15, ASUS VivoBook 15.6, Samsung, HP), closure type, and pocket details — remove the 'consultar por mensaje' instruction entirely.
Rebuild the title to follow the format: Brand + Product Type + Key Feature + Material + Size, e.g., 'CDTek Funda Sleeve Neoprene con Bolsillo para Notebook 15.6 Pulgadas'.
Remove 'buen precio' from the title immediately, as it is a policy-violating promotional phrase that also reduces search ranking.
Fill in the MATERIAL attribute (e.g., neoprene, polyester) and COLOR attribute, as these are the top filters buyers use when searching for laptop cases.
Add COMPATIBLE_BRANDS attribute listing the major notebook brands this sleeve fits (Dell, ASUS, HP, Lenovo, Samsung) to capture accessory compatibility searches.
Add CLOSURE_TYPE attribute (zipper, velcro, magnetic) since this is a primary differentiator among competing sleeve listings.
